## `nightowl_queue.py` — Clean

No significant issues. The RPCError status code check at line 45 (`exc.status.value != 6`) is an undocumented magic number — status 6 is `ALREADY_EXISTS` — a comment would help, but it's minor. The redundant `sig_handle = client.get_handle(WORKFLOW_ID)` at line 50 is harmless (works even when `start_workflow` succeeded and the handle was already available), but slightly wasteful. Not a real bug.
